items.summary: Add the Google AdSense auto-ads script tag to the HTML entry point (frontend/index.html) in the <head> section, using a placeholder AdSense publisher ID (ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXX) that the user can easily replace with their actual publisher ID once their site is approved by Google AdSense.

Add a dedicated AdSense display ad unit component (AdBanner.tsx) that renders a responsive Google AdSense ad slot using the <ins class='adsbygoogle'> element, with a placeholder ad slot ID that the user can replace. Place this component in visible, non-intrusive positions on the HomePage: once below the hero section and once above the footer.
